title: cynoglossum dieterlei
intro: Cynoglossum dieterlei, also known as Dieterle's hound's-tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum dieterlei include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum dieterlei is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
